data.name: AreYouSureDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

data.name: ExibirEsteProviderNaTelaDeLogin
data.value: Show this provider on the login screen

data.name: ExternalPictureText
data.value: Photo returned by the external provider when available.

data.name: ManageAccountText
data.value: Manage security, sessions, devices, language, and authentication methods for your account.

data.name: MfaPrepared
data.value: Prepared structure for Authenticator, email, recovery codes, and WebAuthn.

data.name: NoPostLogoutRedirectUriRegistered
data.value: No post logout redirect URI registered.

data.name: PictureFromProvider
data.value: Picture returned by your external login provider.

data.name: RoleHintAdmin
data.value: Full access to the admin panel.

data.name: TextAbraMicrosoftAuthenticatorGoogleAuthenticatorAuthy1passwordOu
data.value: Open Microsoft Authenticator, Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, or Bitwarden and add a new account.

data.name: TextAcesseComSeuEMailESenhaPara
data.value: Sign in with your email and password to open the admin panel.

data.name: TextAltereGrantsEndpointsRedirectsScopesEConsentimentoDo
data.value: Change grants, endpoints, redirects, scopes and client consent.

data.name: TextAnErrorOccurredWhileProcessingYourRequest
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: TextAoPermitirVoceSeraRedirecionadoDeVoltaPara
data.value: When you allow access, you will be redirected back to the requesting application. This decision will be saved for this app and will not be requested again while consent remains valid.

data.name: TextAoRegenerarCopieOValorExibidoDepoisDo
data.value: Ao regenerar, copie o valor exibido depois do salvamento e atualize o sistema cliente.

data.name: TextAplicacoesAutorizadasAUsarSeuIdentityProvider
data.value: Applications authorized to use your Identity Provider.

data.name: TextAposEscanearInformeOCodigoAtualGeradoPelo
data.value: After scanning, enter the current code generated by the app.

data.name: TextAtualizeDadosDaContaEMarqueApenasAs
data.value: Update account data and select only the roles this user should have.

data.name: TextAutenticacaoModernaComOidcOauth2EAuthorizationCode
data.value: Modern authentication with OIDC, OAuth2, and authorization code.

data.name: TextBaseProntaParaMfaAuditoriaApisProtegidasE
data.value: Base ready for MFA, auditing, protected APIs and Rareles login

data.name: TextCadastreOsDadosQueSeraoUsadosParaExibir
data.value: Register the data used to display and control external providers on the login screen.

data.name: TextCadastreUmaAplicacaoQuePoderaUsarOAuth2demo
data.value: Register an application that can use Auth2Demo as an OpenID Connect provider.

data.name: TextCadastreUmaContaLocalPorPadraoNovosUsuarios
data.value: Create a local account. By default, new users are created without administrative roles.

data.name: TextCentralParaMensagensDeConfirmacaoRecuperacaoMfaE
data.value: Central place for confirmation, recovery, MFA, and welcome messages.

data.name: TextColeUmJwtParaVisualizarOPayloadE
data.value: Paste a JWT to view the payload and make integration testing easier.

data.name: TextComKeyVaultSecretsManagerOuCriptografiaNo
data.value: with Key Vault, Secrets Manager, or database encryption. This registration already prepares the structure for the admin panel.

data.name: TextConfigurePermissoesScopesRedirectsEDadosDoAplicativo
data.value: Configure permissions, scopes, redirects, and application data.

data.name: TextConsulteContasAltereStatusEGerenciePermissoesAdministrativas
data.value: Review accounts, change status, and manage administrative permissions.

data.name: TextControleAdministrativoDosMetodosDeSegundoFatorDos
data.value: Administrative control of users' second-factor methods.

data.name: TextCopieAgoraDepoisEleNaoSeraExibidoNovamente
data.value: Copy it now. It will not be shown again.

data.name: TextCrieRolesPersonalizadasEAtribuaPermissoesAosUsuarios
data.value: Create custom roles and assign permissions to users from the edit screen.

data.name: TextCrieUmaContaLocalParaTestarOIdentity
data.value: Create a local account to test the Identity Provider. The created account starts as a regular user.

data.name: TextDadosPrincipaisDoUsuarioAutenticado
data.value: Main information for the authenticated user.

data.name: TextDefinaOsScopesQueOsClientsPodemSolicitar
data.value: Define the scopes clients can request in tokens.

data.name: TextDepoisDeEscanearInformeOCodigoDe6
data.value: After scanning, enter the 6-digit code generated by the app.

data.name: TextDesabilitarMfaReduzASegurancaDaContaContinuar
data.value: Disabling MFA reduces account security. Continue?

data.name: TextDigiteEstaChaveManualmenteNoAplicativo
data.value: Enter this key manually in the app:

data.name: TextDigiteOCodigoDe6DigitosGeradoNo
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code generated by Microsoft Authenticator, Google Authenticator or another compatible app.

data.name: TextEnvironmentWillDisplayMoreDetailedInformationAboutThe
data.value: environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.

data.name: TextEquipamentosUsadosParaAcessarOPortal
data.value: Devices used to access the portal.

data.name: TextEstaTabelaControlaQuaisBotoesAparecemNoLogin
data.value: This table controls which buttons appear on the login screen. The user link with the provider is still saved by ASP.NET Identity in

data.name: TextEstaTelaPermiteAoAdministradorConfigurarOMfa
data.value: This screen allows the administrator to configure the user's MFA. The user must be present with their phone: scan the QR Code in Microsoft Authenticator or Google Authenticator and enter the 6-digit code below.

data.name: TextEstruturaPreparadaParaWebauthnWindowsHelloFaceId
data.value: Structure prepared for WebAuthn, Windows Hello, Face ID, Touch ID, and physical security keys.

data.name: TextExcluirEstaRoleElaNaoPodeEstarAtribuida
data.value: Delete this role? It cannot be assigned to any user.

data.name: TextGerarNovosCodigosDeRecuperacaoOsAntigosSerao
data.value: Generate new recovery codes? The old ones will be invalidated.

data.name: TextGerarUmaNovaChaveEInvalidarOQr
data.value: Generate a new key and invalidate the current QR Code?

data.name: TextGerencieOsProvedoresExternosExibidosNaTelaDe
data.value: Manage the external providers shown on the login screen, such as Google, Microsoft, GitHub or custom OIDC providers.

data.name: TextInvalidaOSecretAtualDepoisVocePrecisaAtualizar
data.value: Invalidates the current secret. You must update the client system afterwards.

data.name: TextIssoVaiDesabilitarOMfaAtualEGerar
data.value: This will disable the current MFA and generate a new key. Continue?

data.name: TextItCanResultInDisplayingSensitiveInformationFrom
data.value: It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users. For local debugging, enable the

data.name: TextMarcarAdicionaARoleDesmarcarRemoveARole
data.value: Marcar adiciona a role. Desmarcar remove a role ao salvar.

data.name: TextMarqueSomenteOsScopesQueEsteAplicativoPode
data.value: Select only the scopes this application can request. This prevents scope permission errors.

data.name: TextMostreEstesCodigosAoUsuarioUmaUnicaVez
data.value: Show these codes to the user only once. They will not be displayed again.

data.name: TextOpcionalNaoMarqueNadaParaCriarUmUsuario
data.value: Optional. Do not select anything to create a regular user.

data.name: TextPainelAdministrativoParaUsuariosRolesClientsEScopes
data.value: Admin panel for users, roles, clients and scopes

data.name: TextPersonalizeNomeLogoCoresTemaECssDo
data.value: Customize the portal name, logo, colors, theme and CSS.

data.name: TextPoliticaDeSenhaBloqueioMfaETempoDe
data.value: Password, lockout, MFA, and token lifetime policy.

data.name: TextProtejaLoginsComUsuarioESenhaUsandoUm
data.value: Protect username and password logins with an authenticator app. There is no cost and it does not depend on SMS.

data.name: TextQuerAcessarSuaContaNoAuth2demo
data.value: wants to access your Auth2Demo account.

data.name: TextRastreieEventosCriticosDeAutenticacaoAdministracaoEConfiguracao
data.value: Track critical authentication, administration and configuration events.

data.name: TextRegenerarOSecretDesteClientOSistemaCliente
data.value: Regenerate this client secret? The client system will need to be updated.

data.name: TextRemoveEstaAplicacaoEImpedeNovosLoginsUsando
data.value: Removes this application and prevents new logins using this ClientId.

data.name: TextResumoRapidoParaProtegerAConta
data.value: Quick summary to protect the account.

data.name: TextReviseOsEscoposAbaixoAntesDeContinuar
data.value: Review the scopes below before continuing.

data.name: TextSalveEstesCodigosEmLocalSeguroElesAparecem
data.value: Save these codes in a safe place. They appear only now and each one can be used only once.

data.name: TextSeparePorLinhaEspacoOuVirgulaScopesNao
data.value: Separate by line, space, or comma. Scopes that are not allowed generate an error when the client requests login or token issuance.

data.name: TextServidorDeAutenticacaoProprioSeguroEExtensivelCom
data.value: Your own secure and extensible authentication server with ASP.NET Core Identity + OpenIddict for users, clients, roles, APIs, scopes and tokens.

data.name: TextTemCertezaQueDesejaExcluirEsteClient
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this client?

data.name: TextTheDevelopmentEnvironmentShouldnTBeEnabledFor
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.

data.name: TextUltimosAcessosRegistradosNaConta
data.value: Latest access records for the account.

data.name: TextUmaUriPorLinhaParaAspNetCore
data.value: Uma URI por linha. Para ASP.NET Core MVC, use normalmente

data.name: TextUseEstaChaveCasoOAppNaoConsiga
data.value: Use this key if the app cannot scan the QR Code.

data.name: TextUseSuasCredenciaisParaAcessarSeuPerfilE
data.value: Use your credentials to access your profile and, if you are an administrator, manage the identity server.

data.name: TextUseThisPageToDetailYourSiteS
data.value: Use this page to detail your site's privacy policy.

data.name: TextUseUmDosCodigosSalvosQuandoConfigurouO
data.value: Use one of the codes saved when you configured MFA. Each code works only once.

data.name: TextVisaoDeSaudeDosComponentesPrincipais
data.value: Health overview of the main components.

data.name: TextVisaoOperacionalDoServidorDeIdentidadeUsuariosLogins
data.value: Operational view of the identity server: users, logins, providers, sessions, security and integrations.

data.name: TextVoceNaoTemPermissaoParaAcessarEssaArea
data.value: You do not have permission to access this area.

data.name: TextWebUsaSecretSpaMobileNormalmenteEPublic
data.value: Web uses a secret. SPA/mobile is usually a public client. Machine-to-machine uses client credentials.

data.name: UseAnotherServiceToLogin
data.value: Use another service to log in.

data.name: YouDoNotHaveAccess
data.value: You do not have access to this resource.

data.name: MfaProfileHint
data.value: Protect your account with a second factor.

data.name: EditProfileText
data.value: Update the public name shown in the portal and admin screens.

data.name: LanguagePreferenceText
data.value: Choose the language used after you sign in.

data.name: AdminShortcutsText
data.value: Administrative actions available because your account has the admin role.

data.name: ManageUsersText
data.value: Manage accounts, roles, status and profile information.

data.name: ManageClientsText
data.value: Manage OAuth/OIDC clients and redirect URLs.

data.name: DisplayNameMaxLength
data.value: Display name must have at most 100 characters.

data.name: TokenDecodeFailed
data.value: The token could not be decoded.

data.name: ClientIdAlreadyExists
data.value: A client with this ClientId already exists.

data.name: ClientSecretRegenerated
data.value: Secret regenerated. Update the client application with the new value.

data.name: IdentityProviderAlreadyExists
data.value: A provider with this name or scheme already exists.

data.name: SystemProvidersCannotBeDeleted
data.value: System providers cannot be deleted. Disable the provider if you do not want to show it on the login page.

data.name: InvalidAuthenticatorCodeCheckDeviceTime
data.value: Invalid code. Check the device time and try again.

data.name: AuditAdminEnabledMfaAuthenticator
data.value: Administrator configured and enabled authenticator MFA for the user.

data.name: AuditAdminDisabledUserMfa
data.value: Administrator disabled MFA for the user.

data.name: AuditAdminResetUserAuthenticatorKey
data.value: Administrator reset the user authenticator key.

data.name: AuthenticatorResetConfigureNewQrCode
data.value: Authenticator reset. Configure the new QR code to enable it again.

data.name: UserMustHaveMfaEnabledToGenerateCodes
data.value: The user must have MFA enabled to generate codes.

data.name: AuditAdminGeneratedUserRecoveryCodes
data.value: Administrator generated recovery codes for the user.

data.name: UserTemporarilyLockedInvalidAttempts
data.value: User temporarily locked due to invalid attempts.

data.name: AuditUserLockedByMfaFailures
data.value: User locked due to MFA failures.

data.name: AuditUserEnabledMfaAuthenticator
data.value: User enabled MFA with an authenticator app.

data.name: AuthenticatorKeyResetScanQrAgain
data.value: Key reset. Scan the new QR code and confirm again.

data.name: EnableMfaBeforeGeneratingRecoveryCodes
data.value: Enable MFA before generating recovery codes.

data.name: ExternalProviderDisabledOrNotRegistered
data.value: External provider disabled or not registered.

data.name: ExternalLoginInfoLoadFailed
data.value: The external login information could not be loaded.

data.name: ExternalProviderDidNotReturnEmail
data.value: The external provider did not return an email address.

data.name: ConsentPostMissingClientId
data.value: ClientId is empty. The consent POST arrived without client_id. Check Consent.cshtml.

data.name: UserDeniedApplicationAccess
data.value: The user denied access to the application.

data.name: RemoveUsersFromRoleBeforeDeleting
data.value: Remove this role from users before deleting it.

data.name: TextEventosDeLoginConsentimentoMfaEAdmin
data.value: Login, consent, MFA, and administration events.

data.name: UseWithCareMfaDetails
data.value: Use with care. To enable MFA with an authenticator app, open the configuration, scan the QR Code on the user's phone, and confirm the generated code.

data.name: EmailConfirmationRequiredBeforeLogin
data.value: You must confirm your email before signing in.

data.name: EmailConfirmationSentDescription
data.value: We created your account for {0}, but you must confirm this email before signing in.

data.name: TemporaryConfirmationLinkNotice
data.value: Temporary development mode: use the confirmation link below. Later you can send this link by email through SMTP.

data.name: InvalidEmailConfirmationLink
data.value: The email confirmation link is invalid or expired.

data.name: EmailConfirmedSuccessfully
data.value: Your email was confirmed successfully. You can now sign in.

data.name: EmailConfirmationFailed
data.value: We could not confirm your email. Generate a new confirmation link and try again.

data.name: ForgotPasswordDescription
data.value: Informe seu e-mail e vamos gerar um link para redefinir a senha.

data.name: PasswordResetSentDescription
data.value: Se a conta {0} existir e usar senha, use o link temporário abaixo para redefinir.

data.name: TemporaryPasswordResetLinkNotice
data.value: Modo temporário de desenvolvimento: use o link de redefinição abaixo. Depois você poderá enviar esse link por e-mail via SMTP.

data.name: PasswordResetGenericNoLink
data.value: Nenhum link de redefinição foi gerado. Confira o e-mail ou use Google/Microsoft se esta conta foi criada com provedor externo.

data.name: InvalidPasswordResetLink
data.value: O link de redefinição de senha é inválido ou expirou.

data.name: PasswordResetSuccessfully
data.value: Sua senha foi redefinida com sucesso. Você já pode entrar.

data.name: ResetPasswordDescription
data.value: Crie uma nova senha para sua conta.

data.name: AuditPasswordResetLinkGenerated
data.value: Link de redefinição de senha gerado em modo de desenvolvimento.

data.name: AuditPasswordResetSucceeded
data.value: Usuário redefiniu a senha com sucesso.

data.name: ClientCreatePageDescription
data.value: Register an OAuth/OIDC application with secrets, required claims, grant types, redirect URIs and scopes using the new professional client model.

data.name: ClientEditPageDescription
data.value: Update the client configuration, allowed flows, required claims, redirects and scopes. Existing secrets remain protected and are not shown again.

data.name: ClientFormIntro
data.value: Configure identification, OAuth/OIDC flows, secrets, required claims, redirects and scopes in a single flow.

data.name: ClientIdentificationHelp
data.value: Define the public client identifier and how it will be presented to users.

data.name: ClientIdHelp
data.value: Identifier used by the client application in OAuth/OIDC calls.

data.name: DisplayNameHelp
data.value: Name shown in consent and administration screens.

data.name: ApplicationTypeHelp
data.value: Web uses a secret; SPA/Mobile clients are usually public; M2M uses client credentials.

data.name: ClientSecretsFormHelp
data.value: Create one or more secrets stored in IdentityApplicationSecrets. The full value will be shown only once after saving.

data.name: ExistingSecretsHiddenHelp
data.value: Existing secrets remain hidden. To replace a secret, add a new one and revoke the old one in the details screen.

data.name: RequiredClaimsHelp
data.value: Use this when only users with a specific claim can authorize this client.

data.name: AllowedFlowsHelp
data.value: Select which OAuth/OIDC flows this client can use.

data.name: RedirectUrisHelp
data.value: Configure the allowed callback URLs for login and logout.

data.name: ClientDetailsIntro
data.value: Manage the OAuth/OIDC client, secrets, required claims, redirect URIs, grant types and allowed scopes.

data.name: CopyNowSecretNotShownAgain
data.value: Copy it now. For security, it will not be shown again.

data.name: ClientSecretsDetailsHelp
data.value: Create multiple secrets per client, with expiration and individual revocation, like Azure App registrations. The full value is only shown when created.

data.name: CreateSecretForConfidentialHelp
data.value: Create a secret for confidential or machine-to-machine clients.

data.name: RequiredClaimsDetailsHelp
data.value: The user must have these claims to use this client in the authorization flow.

data.name: SelectOnlyScopesThisClientCanRequest
data.value: Select only the scopes this application can request.

data.name: RegeneratePrimarySecretHelp
data.value: Revokes all active secrets and creates a new one. Update client systems immediately.

data.name: DeleteClientHelp
data.value: Removes this application and prevents new logins using this client.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteClient
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this client?

data.name: ClientCreatedButCouldNotBeLoaded
data.value: The client was created but could not be loaded.

data.name: OnlyConfidentialClientsCanHaveSecrets
data.value: Only confidential clients can have secrets.

data.name: ApplicationAuditDescription
data.value: Review client application lifecycle, soft delete and audit metadata.

data.name: ApplicationSecretsAuditDescription
data.value: Review generated, active, expired and revoked client secrets.

data.name: PasswordLoginDisabledForThisApplication
data.value: Password login is disabled for this application.

data.name: ExternalProviderDisabledForThisApplication
data.value: This provider is disabled for this application.
